record.name: type
record.value: only the type, not the metric name, will be exported from metrics

Values.value: Monitoring Adapter connection state, 0 = disabled 1 = enabled -1 = OTHER

record.name: type
record.value: only the type, not the metric name, will be exported from metrics

Values.value: Monitoring Adapter listener state, 0 = disabled 1 = enabled -1 = OTHER

record.name: type
record.value: only the type, not the metric name, will be exported from metrics

Values.value: Monitoring Adapter (listener) notification state, 0 = disabled 1 = enabled -1 = OTHER
